title: SessionEnded
description: Station notification reporting the autonomous end of a session due to timer expiry or hardware fault.

reason.description: Why the session ended autonomously. TimerExpired: durationSeconds elapsed. Fault: hardware fault detected. Local: user manually stopped at the station (e.g., physical Stop button). LocalOutOfCredit: offline credit pool exhausted mid-session. Deauthorized: offline pass revoked mid-session via RevocationEpoch bump. See spec/03-messages.md §5.4 for full descriptions and spec/04-flows.md §6 for refund policy per reason.
